description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved trastuzumab (subcutaneous - 21 days) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of HER2 positive early breast cancer following surgery, chemotherapy (neoadjuvant or adjuvant), and radiotherapy (if applicable).

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
